Recipe for Disaster.rewards_block:
==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Recipe for Disaster
|image = [[File:Recipe for Disaster (Defeating the Culinaromancer) reward scroll.png|centre]]
In total, completing all 10 subquests for "Recipe for Disaster" awards:
|qp = 10
|rewards = 
*An [[Antique lamp (Recipe for Disaster)|antique lamp]], which grants 20,000 experience to any skill above 50 (can be banked for later use)
*Access to the following areas:
**[[Mogre Camp]]
**[[Evil Chicken's Lair]]
*Ability to dive for crabs
*Ability to cook [[crab meat]]
*Ability to catch [[hell-rat]]s
*Ability to own a [[hellcat]]
*Ability to add coloured spices to [[stew]]s of any sort
*Ability to use the boat trip to travel between [[Karamja]] and [[Feldip Hills]]
*[[Ape Atoll Teleport (standard)|Ape Atoll Teleport]] spell
*Full access to [[Culinaromancer's Chest]]
**Access to [[Kitchen weaponry]]
**Access to the banking chest (under Lumbridge Castle)
**Access to a food store in the [[Culinaromancer's Chest]]
**Access to buy [[Barrows gloves]]

Unlocks:
* [[Evil Chicken]] accessible in the [[Nightmare Zone]] on completion of [[Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze|Recipe for Disaster - Freeing Sir Amik Varze]] subquest.
* [[Agrith-Na-Na]], [[Flambeed]], [[Karamel]], [[Dessourt]], [[Gelatinnoth Mother]], [[Culinaromancer]] accessible in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after quest completion.

}}

Fairytale II - Cure a Queen.rewards_block:
==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
|image = [[File:Fairytale II - Cure a Queen reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 2
|rewards = *{{SCP|Herblore|3,500}} [[Herblore]] experience
*{{SCP|Thieving|2,500}} [[Thieving]] experience

'''Note:''' There are six Medium [[Achievement Diary]] entries requiring travel to a fairy ring which can be completed once fairy rings are unlocked: {{fairycode|ALS}} ([[Kandarin Diary|Kandarin]]); {{fairycode|AIR}} and {{fairycode|BIS}} ([[Ardougne Diary|Ardougne]]); {{fairycode|CIP}} ([[Fremennik Diary|Fremennik]]); {{fairycode|DIS}} ([[Lumbridge & Draynor Diary|Lumbridge & Draynor]]); {{Fairycode|CIR}} ([[Kourend & Kebos Diary|Kourend & Kebos]])

X Marks the Spot.rewards_block:
==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = X Marks the Spot
|image = [[File:X Marks the Spot reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards =
*200 [[coins]]
*[[Antique lamp (X Marks the Spot)|Antique lamp]] providing 300 experience in a skill of the player's choosing (can be reclaimed if lost or destroyed)
*The ability to receive [[scroll box]]es
*A [[Scroll box (beginner)|beginner scroll box]] (only if the player does not have one already in their possession; can be claimed later if players had one in their possession already)
*+1 cap on all tiers of clue scrolls
}}

The Tourist Trap.rewards_block:
==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = The Tourist Trap
|image = [[File:The Tourist Trap reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 2
|rewards = 
*4,650 [[Experience]] in your choice of two skills (you may pick same skill twice): {{SCP|Agility}} [[Agility]], {{SCP|Fletching}} [[Fletching]], {{SCP|Smithing}} [[Smithing]], or {{SCP|Thieving}} [[Thieving]].
*The ability to smith [[dart tip]]s.
*The [[wrought iron key]] - allows access to a special door inside the [[Desert Mining Camp]], which has several higher tier ores inside, including [[mithril ore]] and [[adamantite ore]].
*Full [[slave robes]]
*6 [[bronze dart]]s
*The ability to hire [[Ex-Captain Siad]] as a [[crewmate]] with {{SCP|Sailing|50|link=yes}}.
}}
